user.title: Set up 1-Wire SysBus
user.description: Configure the 1-Wire kernel driver mount directory on your Raspberry Pi.

data_description.mount_dir: Path to the SysBus 1-Wire mount directory, usually /sys/bus/w1/devices/

error.invalid_path: Mount directory not found. Make sure dtoverlay=w1-gpio is enabled.

abort.mount_dir_mismatch: The new mount directory does not match this config entry.
